ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the feature belongs to */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mood the feature belongs to */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the song */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the song (major or minor) */,
  "time_signature" TEXT /* Time signature of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_mood_id FOREIGN KEY ("mood_id") REFERENCES moods ("mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences in JSON format (e.g., preferred genres, moods) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended songs */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being recommended */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
